text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow! What a heroic rescue! Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wait... Oh no! Some of them are still left behind!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Next time, I'll bring Taishin and Hayahide,
and we'll get the rest of you out!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Just hold on! I'll come back with my friends!
